symptom_vector: High CPU utilization, CPU saturation, CPU overload, CPU usage spike

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [recommendationservice] (From Ground Truth)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_cpu_usage] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [rrt] and [rrt_max] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [pod_cpu_usage] (From Ground Truth)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: pod_cpu_usage values spiked from 0.0 to 0.4 (change rate 2.0) for recommendationservice-0, recommendationservice-1, and from 0.03 to 0.4 (change rate 1.7209) for recommendationservice-2
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [pod_cpu_usage] in anomaly_metrics data and check for significant increases during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: pod_processes increased from 1.0 to 12.0 (change rate 1.6923) for all three recommendationservice pods
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [pod_processes] in anomaly_metrics data and verify abnormal process count increase

critical_checks.expected_pattern: rrt_max for recommendationservice-2 increased from 19820.5 to 1394701.5 (change rate 1.944)
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [rrt_max] in anomaly_metrics data and check for response time degradation
